# Pull Request

## Spec Kit Traceability

- Spec:
- Plan:
- Tasks:
- User stories:

## Summary

Describe the change in product terms.

## Architecture

- Layers changed:
- Design pattern used:
- Why this pattern fits:
- Simpler alternative considered:

## Reuse and Extensibility

- Existing classes/components/files reused:
- New reusable classes/components/files added:
- How future screens or use cases can integrate with this change:

## Tests

- Unit tests:
- Contract tests:
- Integration tests:
- Architecture tests:
- Manual validation, if automation is not practical:

## Quality Gates

- [ ] Formatting passed
- [ ] Linting/static analysis passed where configured
- [ ] Tests passed
- [ ] Architecture boundaries verified
- [ ] No `.env` files, secrets, API keys, private keys, credentials, or local paths committed
- [ ] AI-generated code reviewed and tested

## Risks

Document remaining risks, skipped tests, or quality gates that could not be run.
